JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:47AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. DAVID MENDEZ FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, DEBBIE BELL, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, DEBBIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 387 ELLIS STREET #415, S.F. $2,225.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,225.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-27-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, UNTIL AFTER 09:00AM. SHOULD DEFT VACATE THE PREMISES AND RETURN ALL KEYS TO THE PLTF BEFORE THE EXPIRATION OF THE SHERIFF STAY, THEN THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND THE DEFT SHALL OWE NO RENTS OR COSTS.
